title: Keyboard Translation Table
text: Keyboard Translation Table A Keyboard Translation Table is a Development Object that maps user input to structure editor functions recognized by Uniface. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ktt Main Development Object? No Part of: Untyped Library Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: KeyboardTableName .ktt URI format: ktt: KeyboardTableName Specialization Keyboard Translation Table specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a Library as parent object. It has no child development objects. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
